message:
feat(theme): add Colorblind accessibility preset for deuteranopia/protanopia

Add 19th theme preset (Colorblind) based on Tokyo Night with color
substitutions that keep all role indicators distinguishable for red-green
colorblind users:
- success: green #73daca → cyan #7dcfff
- error: red #f7768e → magenta #bb9af7
- warning: amber unchanged (#e0af68, already CB-safe)
Background, text, and structural colors remain identical to Tokyo Night.

Wiring across all theme subsystems:
- components/theme.rs: ThemePalette::colorblind() constructor, Colorblind
  variant in ThemePreset enum, ALL array bumped 18→19, display_name/palette
  match arms, cycle/count tests updated
- style_system.rs: UiThemePreset::Colorblind variant with serde alias "cb",
  all() array 18→19, display_name/from_str (accepts "colorblind", "cb", "cvd",
  etc.), to_theme dispatch, colorblind_theme() builder function using
  ThemeBuilder::from_theme(tokyo_night), cycle test assertions updated
- theme.rs: doc comment updated "eighteen" → "nineteen"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
